Question Name: How is security inherently utilized with this asset?
Question Description: End of life systems have no patch management capabilities.  IoT devices do not typically bake in access control.  The ability to bake security into an asset is an important aspect of inherent risk.

Question Name: What is the classification of the asset type?
Question Description: Crown Jewel assets have more impact than business critical or business crucial.

Question Name: Which regulations with fines for breaches apply to this system?
Question Description: PHI is the most dangerous and the more regulations the higher the impact.
